name: eldora-inline-diff-comments
title: Inline Diff Comments
author: Eldora UI
description: Adds local comment threads and resolution controls to caller-provided code diff lines.

changes: Renamed the exported component to a neutral Inline Diff Comments identity and changed absolute imports to its bundled relative support closure.
Removed the seeded reviewer comment, added caller-provided initial comments plus comment and resolution callbacks, and retained local comments while threads close and reopen.

Added empty states, unique field and thread IDs, button types, keyboard submit, Escape close, focus restoration, touch-sized mobile controls, explicit left-to-right code flow, and reduced-motion transitions.
Stopped replacing code content with an aria-label and made long diff lines scroll without breaking the surrounding component.
Changed the utility import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and installation-target portability.
Changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils, normalized utility ordering, and suppressed transitions under reduced motion.
Changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils, normalized utility ordering, and suppressed transitions under reduced motion.
Changed the utility import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and installation-target portability.
Changed the utility import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and installation-target portability.
Changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils and suppressed tooltip animation and transitions under reduced motion.

license.scope: apps/www/registry/eldoraui/github-inline-comments.tsx, apps/www/components/ui/avatar.tsx, badge.tsx, button.tsx, separator.tsx, textarea.tsx, tooltip.tsx, and apps/www/registry/lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Repointed bundled imports; removed seeded fake discussion data; added caller data and event hooks, persistent local thread state, empty states, unique IDs, semantic button types, keyboard submit and close, focus return, touch-sized mobile controls, direction-safe code, reduced-motion transitions, and horizontal code overflow.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied diff-review interaction standalone and real-data-ready while repairing keyboard, touch, responsive, RTL, and accessible-name behavior.
Resolve the bundled support utility from both the source batch and installation target.

modifications.change: Changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils, normalized class order, and added reduced-motion transition suppression.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support component portable and motion-safe.
